modes.title: Mode
modes.humanModeDesc: Sets your communication tone and available features.
modes.interfaceDepthDesc: Controls which panels and technical details are visible.
modes.calmDesc: Peaceful, grounded communication. Nature-paced, low friction.
modes.sovereignDesc: Full control. Consent-first, privacy-forward, data sovereignty.
modes.focusDesc: Minimal distractions. Only essential actions visible.
modes.careDesc: Warm, supportive tone. Ideal for support circles and close connections.
modes.creator: Creator
modes.creatorDesc: Expressive, collaborative. Full composer and file tools visible.
modes.shieldDesc: Elevated privacy. Extra consent checks, minimal metadata, relay-sealed.
modes.emergencyDesc: Elevated privacy. Extra consent checks, minimal metadata, relay-sealed.
modes.simpleDesc: Clean, peaceful interface. Dev panels and diagnostics hidden.
modes.advancedDesc: Privacy, storage, and trust controls visible.
modes.developerDesc: Full QA panels, relay boundary, integrity hashes, diagnostics.

settings.title: Settings
settings.earthAliveDesc: Nature gradient · always available · no camera
settings.liveWorldDesc: See your surroundings while grounded · requires camera
settings.cameraWarningDesc: Live view is for calm presence and awareness. Do not interact with your phone while driving or in motion.
settings.encryptionDesc: End-to-end encrypted locally. Keys never leave your device.
settings.localFirstStorageDesc: All messages stored on this device first.
settings.consentEngineDesc: Active — all messages pass consent checks.
settings.exportDataDesc: Download all local messages and ledger events.
settings.localFirstDesc: All messages stay on this device. No sync. Full privacy.
settings.demoDesc: Pre-seeded conversations and mock data. Good for exploration.
settings.networkDesc: Real relay transport. Requires production auth and E2EE key exchange.
settings.viewModeDesc: Controls which panels and details are visible.
settings.userViewDesc: Clean, peaceful interface. Dev panels and diagnostics are hidden.
settings.advancedViewDesc: Shows privacy, delivery, and consent panels.
settings.developerViewDesc: Full diagnostic panels, technical readiness checks, and raw system state.
settings.resetLocalDataDesc: Clears all local messages, settings, and ledger events.
settings.confirmResetDesc: This will clear all local messages, settings, and ledger events. This action cannot be recovered.
settings.earthosMessagingDesc: Sovereign, consent-first. Local-first. Privacy by design.
settings.harmonyOffDesc: Mirror disabled. Shield protection still active for critical content.
settings.harmonySoftDesc: Gentle reflection only. No holds. You always decide.
settings.harmonyClearDesc: Clearer reflection from mild signals. No holds.
settings.harmonyStrictDesc: Pauses strong messages for your review. Override always available.
settings.harmonyGuardianDesc: Stronger safety for group and community spaces.

dashboard.title: App Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: System status at a glance
dashboard.localFirstActive: Active — all data stays on device

composer.mutedNotice: Conversation muted — messages still arrive locally.
composer.approvalNotice: Messages need approval before they are stored.
composer.pausedDesc: Adjust trust or consent settings to resume.

conversation.conversationDetailsHelper: Summarizes the conversation state and audit metadata.
conversation.addToHomeScreen: Add to Home Screen for the full app experience.
conversation.storageLocalOnly: Messages stay on device only. Server never holds content.
conversation.storageEncryptedRelay: Server relays encrypted messages and clears after delivery.
conversation.storageEncryptedBackup: Encrypted backup placeholder — not active yet.
conversation.trustedTagline: A trusted conversation starts with trust.
conversation.everythingEncrypted: Everything in this conversation is encrypted.
conversation.inviteBody: Add a trusted person to start a protected conversation.
conversation.sendFirstBody: Your first message will be encrypted and stored on this device.
conversation.relayBody: Messages are encrypted on this device. They will reach others when relay is connected.
conversation.testMessageCreated: Local test message created — stayed on your device.
conversation.firstRunHint: Tap New to start a conversation.
conversation.storageEncryptedRelayDesc: Encrypted in transit, cleared after delivery
conversation.storageLocalOnlyDesc: Stays on this device, never leaves
conversation.governedFooter: All conversations are governed by your consent matrix and trust settings.
conversation.inviteFirstHint: Invite someone first, then send a test message.

auth.consentNotice: By continuing, you agree to the EarthOS principles of data sovereignty and consent-first communication.

privacy.title: Protection
privacy.helperCopy: Controls local storage and message permissions.
privacy.localOnlyDesc: Messages stay only on this device. Nothing leaves.
privacy.encryptedRelayDesc: Encrypted before sending. Server clears after delivery.
privacy.whatThisMeansBody: Even if someone intercepts the data in transit, they cannot read your message. Only you and your recipient hold the keys.
privacy.enableAdvanced: Enable Advanced view in Settings to see key material and encryption details.
privacy.localOnlyHeadline: Your message never leaves this device.
privacy.localOnlyBody: It is encrypted and stored only in your browser. No server ever receives it.
privacy.relayBody: Your message is locked on this device. The server relays it sealed and deletes it after delivery.
privacy.backupBody: An encrypted copy will be stored externally. This feature is partially active.
privacy.encProto: Local encryption active — full sending encryption pending

advanced.privateDetail: Encrypted on this device. Never leaves.
advanced.noRecipientDetail: Add someone to enable message routing.
advanced.readyToRelay: Envelope ready. Relay not yet active.

delivery.helperCopy: Shows whether messages stay local or are ready to relay.
delivery.localMessages: Your messages are local-only. They will never be relayed or backed up.
delivery.inviteTrustedUnlock: Invite a trusted person to enable local message routing.
delivery.envelopeSealed: Encrypted and stored on this device. Relay is not active in this prototype.
delivery.queuedDesc: Your message is stored on this device. Relay is not active in this prototype.
delivery.failedDesc: The message could not be stored locally. Please try again.
delivery.localOnlyExplain: Your messages are your private record. Change storage mode in Privacy settings to enable message routing.

trust.title: Relationship
trust.helperCopy: Defines the relationship level and consent boundary.
trust.tabSubtitle: Understand who can reach you and how your messages are protected.
trust.principleE2EDesc: Your messages are protected before leaving your device.
trust.principleLocalDesc: Data stays on your device first.
trust.principleConsentDesc: Conversations respect your choices and permissions.
trust.principleGradientDesc: Permissions can evolve with the relationship.
trust.levelCommunityDesc: Relationship tied to a group, project, or circle.

messages.couldNotPrepare: Message could not be prepared securely.
messages.localTestMessage: Hello — this is a local test message.

onboarding.title: Welcome to EarthOS
onboarding.subtitle: Sovereign. Consent-first. Local-first.
onboarding.tagline: Your messages, your device, your control.
onboarding.noAccountNotice: No account is required. All data stays on your device.
onboarding.noAccountSyncNotice: Create an EarthID to sync across devices.

retention.title: Message retention
retention.helperCopy: Controls how long message content remains on this device.
retention.scopeLocalDesc: Content is cleared from your device only. Other participants may still have their copy.
retention.scopeRequestDesc: Sends a clear request. Recipient's device will process it if their client supports it.
retention.scopeRequestCaveat: Not enforced in v0.1 — recipient can ignore.
retention.scopeBothDesc: Clears locally and requests relay-enforced bilateral clearing.
retention.scopeBothCaveat: Coming in a future layer — relay enforcement not active.
retention.appliesToTypes: text, file, and voice messages in this conversation.
retention.metadataNote: "Clear from this device" hides content but keeps metadata in the ledger for audit continuity.

files.title: Files
files.transferLocalLabel: Local only — stays on this device
files.transferRelaySublabel: AES-GCM sealed before upload. Server-side relay not yet active.
files.transferVaultSublabel: Long-term sealed storage. You control deletion.
files.transferAddMore: Drop or click to add more files
files.transferReadyRelay: Ready — will be sealed for relay
files.uploadError: Could not save file. Please try again.

voice.title: Voice
voice.audioLocalOnly: Audio stays on this device only.
voice.audioSealedRelay: Sealed before upload. Server never sees plaintext audio.
voice.micDeniedDesc: Allow microphone access in your browser settings, then try again.

errors.cryptoFailedDesc: Could not protect your message. Please try again.

banner.testerDesc: Messages stay on your device. No real delivery yet.

syncStatus.syncFailed: Metadata sync failed. Local data is safe.
syncStatus.signInToSync: Sign in to sync metadata across devices.

invite.title: Invite member
invite.subtitle: Simulated — local only
invite.handleHint: Unique identifier — generates a simulated EarthID
invite.trustLevelHint: Trust level captured at invite time
invite.simulationNotice: A simulated EarthID will be generated from the handle. This member exists only in local storage — no invitation is sent externally.
invite.errorHandleFormat: Handle must be 2–30 characters: letters, numbers, underscores, dots, hyphens.

newConversation.intentionPlaceholder: What is the purpose or intention of this space?
newConversation.footer: All conversations are governed by your consent matrix and trust settings.
newConversation.typeEventDesc: Gather for a moment in time
newConversation.typeSupportCircleDesc: Hold space with care and consent
newConversation.storageRelayDesc: Server relays encrypted payload, deletes on delivery
newConversation.storageLocalDesc: Messages stay on this device — never leaves
newConversation.storageBackupDesc: User-opted backup — EarthOS cannot read content
newConversation.trustTrustedDesc: Explicit mutual trust — direct messaging allowed

mvp.identityInactive: No identity set — using local mode
mvp.consentInactive: No consent settings yet — start a conversation
mvp.encryptionInactive: Send a message to activate local encryption
mvp.relayActive: Relay envelopes created — plaintext never included
mvp.relayInactive: Send a message to create a relay envelope
mvp.portabilityInactive: No data yet — start messaging to generate local records
mvp.loopComplete: Full loop complete — EarthOS Messaging is operational.

sovereignty.panelSubtitle: Stored locally — never sent to server
sovereignty.helperCopy: Checks whether local records match the expected QLPA state.
sovereignty.trustLevelDesc: Controls which protection rules apply when communicating with this person.
sovereignty.requireApprovalDesc: Hold outgoing messages for your review before they are delivered.
sovereignty.blockConversationDesc: Prevent any messages from being sent or received in this conversation.
sovereignty.storageLocalDesc: Messages stay on this device only. Nothing is sent to any server.
sovereignty.storageRelayDesc: Server relays encrypted content and deletes after delivery. Stored locally in this prototype.
sovereignty.storageBackupDesc: Encrypted backup placeholder. Backup is not active yet in this prototype.
sovereignty.storageBackupWarning: Encrypted backup is a placeholder. Messages are stored locally only.
sovereignty.allowDirectMessagesDesc: Allow direct message delivery in this conversation.
sovereignty.allowLocationMessagesDesc: Allow location-tagged messages in this conversation.
sovereignty.intentionMirrorDesc: Before sending, reflect your message back so you can read it as your recipient will.
sovereignty.reflectionSoftDesc: Gentle reflection — shows the message as-is.
sovereignty.reflectionStrictDesc: Strict — pauses if concerns are detected.
sovereignty.localLedgerDesc: Recent events for this conversation. No message content is stored here.
sovereignty.advancedViewGateDesc: Enable Advanced view in Settings to reveal QA panels.
sovereignty.authSyncQADesc: Metadata only — message content never synced.
sovereignty.consentPermissionsQADesc: Live consent decisions based on trust level and conversation type.
sovereignty.relayBoundaryQADesc: Confirms plaintext never leaves this device.
sovereignty.encryptionFoundationDesc: AES-GCM-256 prototype. No key material leaves this browser.
sovereignty.dataPortabilityDesc: Your data is yours. Export, delete, or migrate at any time.
sovereignty.exportDataJson: Export all local data as JSON
sovereignty.deleteConversationBody: This will remove the conversation and all its messages from local storage. This cannot be recovered.
sovereignty.clearAllData: Clear all local data and reload seed
sovereignty.clearAllDataBody: This will reset all local messaging data to the default seed. All messages, settings, and ledger events will be lost.
sovereignty.migrateEarthIdBody: EarthID migration is not yet active. In production, this would initiate a sovereign identity export and allow you to re-link your identity to a new device or provider.
sovereignty.devLockedHint: Enable Developer mode to access Integrity & Security tools.

consent.title: Consent
consent.subtitle: Who can reach you, and how
consent.blockedDesc: No messages can flow in this conversation.
consent.pendingDesc: Your outgoing messages are held for review before being stored locally.
consent.allowedDesc: Messages in this conversation are permitted.
consent.requireApprovalDesc: Hold your outgoing messages for review before they are stored.
consent.muteConversationDesc: Silence notifications. Messages still arrive and are stored.
consent.blockConversationDesc: Stop all messages from being sent or received here.
consent.trustSelfBody: This is your own EarthID. Full access.
consent.trustTrustedBody: Full consent. Messages flow freely in both directions.
consent.trustKnownBody: Known contact. Most messages are permitted.
consent.trustCommunityBody: Community member. Standard consent rules apply.
consent.trustUnknownBody: Unverified contact. Stricter consent rules apply.
consent.trustBlockedBody: No messages can be sent or received.

sovereigntyDrawer.headerSubtitle: Stored locally — never sent to a server
sovereigntyDrawer.advancedHidden: Advanced controls hidden — enable Advanced view in Settings.
sovereigntyDrawer.simpleToolsNote: Switch to Advanced mode to unlock all controls.
sovereigntyDrawer.developerModeRequired: Enable Developer mode to access these tools.
sovereigntyDrawer.requireApprovalDesc: Hold outgoing messages for your review.
sovereigntyDrawer.blockConversationDesc: Prevent all messages in this conversation.
sovereigntyDrawer.allowProjectInvitesDesc: Allow invitations to projects from this conversation.
sovereigntyDrawer.storageModeLocalDesc: Messages stay on this device only. Nothing is sent to any server.
sovereigntyDrawer.storageModeRelayDesc: Server relays encrypted content and deletes after delivery.
sovereigntyDrawer.storageModeBackupDesc: Encrypted backup — not fully active in this prototype.
sovereigntyDrawer.storageModeBackupWarning: Encrypted backup is a placeholder. Messages stored locally only.
sovereigntyDrawer.intentionMirrorDesc: Reflect messages back before sending so you read them as your recipient will.
sovereigntyDrawer.deliveryInfoDesc: Delivery is determined by your storage mode and the presence of recipients. No real-time relay exists in v0.1 — this is the local-first prototype.
sovereigntyDrawer.requireApprovalDeliveryDesc: Hold outgoing messages for review before delivery.

cryptoPanel.protoWarningDesc: AES-GCM-256 symmetric key, device-local only. This is not production E2EE. Future layers will add asymmetric key exchange before any relay sync.
cryptoPanel.noKeyFound: No device key found. A key will be generated automatically when you send your first message.
cryptoPanel.integrityDesc: Verify SHA-256 hashes for all local messages. Placeholder hashes (mock/legacy data) are skipped.
cryptoPanel.integrityAllPassed: All local message integrity checks passed
cryptoPanel.qaDesc: Tests: encrypt → decrypt roundtrip · hash create + verify.
cryptoPanel.qaRoundtripFail: Decrypted output did not match input
cryptoPanel.footerNote: Key stored under {key}. Regenerating the key means previously encrypted messages cannot be re-decrypted. Plaintext body is always kept locally for display.

syncPanel.tableConversationsDesc: Conversation metadata (type, title, storageMode — no body)
syncPanel.signInRequired: Sign-in is required before metadata sync can run. Local mode is active.
syncPanel.localModeNote: Local mode active. Messaging works fully without sign-in. Sync activates automatically when auth is connected.

consentPanel.infoText: Shows who can contact, invite, and relay based on trust level, conversation type, and your current consent toggles. Blocked trust always hard-blocks.

messageDetail.title: Message details
messageDetail.storageLocalOnly: Local only — content never leaves this device
messageDetail.storageEncryptedRelay: Encrypted relay — server relays encrypted payload
messageDetail.timelineLocalOnlyDetail: Storage mode: local_only — message stays on this device
messageDetail.timelineNoRecipientDetail: No other members found in conversation. Message held locally.
messageDetail.timelineRelayPending: Relay channel not yet connected (prototype). Will deliver when live.

search.emptyLocal: All search is fully local — nothing leaves your device.
search.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or change the filter.
search.privacyFooter: Search is fully local — indexed in your browser, never sent to any server.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.emptyDesc: Invite someone to a conversation to add them as a contact.

mirror.title: Intention Mirror
mirror.disclaimer: This is a reflection, not a judgment. You always choose.

modeCard.calmSummary: Peaceful, grounded communication. Voice and ritual notes available.
modeCard.sovereignSummary: Full control. All composer tools and consent features visible.
modeCard.focusSummary: Essential conversation only. Attachments and mirror not shown.
modeCard.careSummary: Warm, supported tone. Voice and ritual notes available.
modeCard.creatorSummary: Expressive tools available. Files, voice, and retention timer visible.
modeCard.shieldSummary: Elevated privacy. Voice and retention timer available. Mirror not shown.

protection.localFirstDesc: Messages are stored on this device. No content is sent to a server.
protection.encryptedDesc: Messages are encrypted on this device. Relay is not active in this prototype.
protection.relayNotActiveDesc: Remote delivery is not yet active. Messages are stored locally only.
protection.consentActiveDesc: All messages pass consent checks before sending.

earthIdSignIn.panelSubtitle: Sign in to enable metadata sync
earthIdSignIn.introText: Enter your email. We'll send a one-click sign-in link — no password needed. Your local messages stay on this device regardless.
earthIdSignIn.checkEmailSent: We sent a sign-in link to
earthIdSignIn.checkEmailInstructions: Open this link in the same browser where EarthOS Messaging is running. This tab will update automatically once authenticated.
earthIdSignIn.localMessagesNote: Your local messages remain safe and available right now.
earthIdSignIn.supabaseNote: Supabase Auth is used only as a session key. EarthID is your sovereign identity — auth.uid() is never exposed in the UI.
earthIdSignIn.footerNote: Local mode remains active. Messaging works fully without sign-in.
earthIdSignIn.invalidEmailError: Please enter a valid email address.
earthIdSignIn.sendFailedError: Could not send sign-in email. Please try again.

identityCard.title: Sovereign. Consent-first. Local-first.
identityCard.description: Your messages stay on your device. No server-side reading. No data harvesting.

landing.messagingSubtitle: Private by design. Your messages never leave your device without your consent.
landing.trust1Body: All messages are stored on your device only. No cloud copy without your explicit choice.
landing.trust2Body: Nothing is shared, relayed, or backed up without a clear decision from you.
landing.trust3Body: Built on open standards. You can export your data at any time.
landing.rootSubtitle: The identity and sovereignty layer underlying EarthOS Messaging.
landing.rootSignal1Body: Your EarthID is yours alone. No platform account, no third-party login required.
landing.rootSignal2Body: Protection is the default, not an option. Data stays local unless you choose otherwise.
landing.rootSignal3Body: Trust is built through real connections, not algorithmic scores.
landing.rootSignal4Body: Your data is always exportable. No lock-in. No gatekeepers.
landing.installDesc: Install EarthOS Messaging for a faster, native app experience.

messageJourney.title: Message journey
messageJourney.advancedHint: Enable Advanced view in Settings to see technical details
messageJourney.consentHeldDetail: Message is awaiting manual approval before it proceeds.
messageJourney.consentNotCheckedDetail: Consent has not been evaluated for this message.
messageJourney.encOnDeviceDetail: Message body was encrypted on-device before storage. No plaintext exists outside this browser.
messageJourney.encPrototype: Local encryption active — relay encryption pending
messageJourney.encPrototypeDetail: Using a local prototype key. Production key exchange is not yet active.
messageJourney.encIntegrityFailedDetail: Hash mismatch detected. The message may have been altered after creation.
messageJourney.encNoneDetail: This message has no encryption applied. Not recommended for sensitive content.
messageJourney.encUnknownDetail: Encryption status could not be determined.
messageJourney.relayNotPreparedDetail: This message has not been prepared for sending to others yet.
messageJourney.relayRecipientsDetail: Message is prepared and addressed. Sending infrastructure is not yet active.
messageJourney.relayNoRecipientDetail: Prepared but no recipients yet. Will activate when someone joins this conversation.
messageJourney.relayLocalOnlyDetail: This message is stored locally only and will not be sent to others.
messageJourney.relayFailedDetail: The message could not be stored locally. Please try again.
messageJourney.deliveredComingSoon: Coming soon — sending infrastructure in progress
messageJourney.deliveredComingSoonDetail: Real-time delivery to others is not yet active. This step will complete when the sending network is ready.

emptyJourney.createLocalTestMessageBody: Creates a local test message on this device. Nothing is sent to anyone.

sendGate.trustRequiredTitle: Real sending needs a trusted recipient
sendGate.trustRequiredBody: Real sending needs a trusted recipient. Invite or trust someone first.

languageHarmony.reflectMessage: We noticed some wording worth reflecting on.
languageHarmony.cautionMessage: Consider how this might feel to the recipient.
languageHarmony.holdMessage: This message has some strong language — take a moment to review.
languageHarmony.blockMessage: This content requires review before sending.
languageHarmony.thisIsReflectionNotJudgment: This is a reflection, not a judgment. You decide.
languageHarmony.shieldBlocked: This content has been flagged for safety review.
languageHarmony.suggestionFeelUnheard: Try expressing what you feel, rather than what they did.
languageHarmony.suggestionPrioritize: Try sharing why this matters to you.
languageHarmony.suggestionOpenRequest: Try making an open request instead.
languageHarmony.suggestionDifferentView: Try sharing your perspective without judgment.
languageHarmony.suggestionFrustratedMoment: I feel frustrated and need a moment.
languageHarmony.suggestionUnderstandEachOther: I feel hurt and would like us to understand each other.
languageHarmony.suggestionLookTogether: Could we look at this together?
languageHarmony.suggestionPrioritizeWhenPossible: Can we prioritize this when possible?

multilingual.localOnlyAnalysis: All analysis is local — your text never leaves this device.
multilingual.unsupportedLanguageSafeMode: Language not fully supported — safe mode active.
multilingual.sameRootCategories: All languages share the same safety categories and severity model.

phoneQa.title: Phone QA
phoneQa.localOnly: Local only — Developer mode only — no network
phoneQa.testerNotePlaceholder: Optional notes about this test session
phoneQa.checklistSection: Checklist — tap to cycle: untested → pass → issue
phoneQa.focusAllPass: All current phone checks pass locally.
phoneQa.pass134FocusItem1: Root/Messaging Φ-card fits without top masking
phoneQa.pass134FocusItem2: New button is clear in Simple mode
phoneQa.pass134FocusItem3: First-run hint appears before first conversation created
phoneQa.pass134FocusItem4: Empty Journey starts at top of view
phoneQa.pass134FocusItem5: Send test message disabled until member invited
phoneQa.pass134FocusItem6: Mobile sheets scroll without background movement
